zh.lifeSummary: Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master是Robert de Sablé-sur Sarthe III,  Lord of Sablé-sur-Marthe和Hersende d’Anthenaise de Chaouches的兒子，於1150年出生在法國安喬。他於1175年與Clemence de Mayenne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1173年登記服兵役。他於1190年被列為english counselor - for richard i, king of england。他去世於1193年9月23日在巴勒斯坦享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Sable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a sandy place, from sable ‘sand’.
French (Sablé): habitational name from a place so called in Sarthe.

variants.name: Zabel
meanings: German: from Middle High German zabel ‘board game’ (from Latin tabula), hence a nickname for a habitual game player.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.description: English crusader ships wreck of the coast of Cyprus. The ship carrying Joanna, Queen of Sicily (King Richard's sister), and Berengaria of Navarre (King Richard's fiance), anchor off Limassol. When King Richard arrives, he regards the Cypriots' behavior as insulting towards the women and captures the island.

en.lifeSummary: Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master was born in 1150, in Anjou, France as the son of Robert de Sablé-sur Sarthe III,  Lord of Sablé-sur-Marthe and Hersende d’Anthenaise de Chaouches. He married Clemence de Mayenne in 1175. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1173. In 1190, his occupation is listed as english counselor - for richard i, king of england. He died on 23 September 1193, in Palestine, at the age of 43.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master nasceu em 1150, em Anjou, França filho de Robert de Sablé-sur Sarthe III,  Lord of Sablé-sur-Marthe e Hersende d’Anthenaise de Chaouches. Ele casou-se com Clemence de Mayenne em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1173. Em 1190, sua profissão aparece como english counselor - for richard i, king of england. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1193, em Palestina, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master родился в 1150 г. в местности анджоу, Франция. Его родителей звали Robert de Sablé-sur Sarthe III,  Lord of Sablé-sur-Marthe и Hersende d’Anthenaise de Chaouches. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence de Mayenne в 1175 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1173 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1190 годуработал по профессии english counselor - for richard i, king of england. Он умер 23 сентября 1193 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master nació en 1150, en Anjou, Francia como hijo de Robert de Sablé-sur Sarthe III,  Lord of Sablé-sur-Marthe y Hersende d’Anthenaise de Chaouches. Se casó con Clemence de Mayenne en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1173. En 1190, su ocupación registrada era english counselor - for richard i, king of england. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1193, en Palestina, a la edad de 43 años.
